title: Bavarian Beef Steak with German Seasoning
description: A hearty Bavarian-inspired dish featuring a marinated beef steak seasoned with traditional German spices.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix together garlic, German seasoning, and 2 tbsp olive oil.
Rub the marinade mixture onto the beef flank steak, making sure to coat it evenly.
Let the steak marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat. Sear the beef steak for 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and cook for an additional 10-12 minutes, or until the steak reaches an internal temperature of 130°F (54°C) for medium-rare.
Let the steak rest for 5 minutes before slicing it thinly against the grain.
Serve the sliced beef with a side of Bauernfristück bread and enjoy!
